title: Das Geheimnis der chinesischen Nelke
overview: Professor Wilkens has invented a formula for a new type of fuel and puts it on a microfiche that he sends to his daughter and her bodyguard, but  multiple different mysterious groups, including the "Chinese Carnation", would kill to get their hands on it.
